LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ULF INGMNAR KAUFFELDT, AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA TIMBERLINE CONSTRUCTION COMPANY, INC.'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THE EVIDENCE DEMONSTRATES THAT DEFENDANT WAS NOT SERVED WITH THE LABOR COMMISSIONER'S DOCUMENTS, INCLUDING THE AWARD. THE MOTION IS TIMELY UNDER CCP 473.5 BECAUSE IT WAS BROUGHT WITHIN 2 YEARS OF THE ENTRY OF THE JUDGMENT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077.

calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Douglas B. Provencher, Esq., 707.284.2380, for plaintiff Alberto Benitez Cruz.
Marc D. Coopersmith, Esq., 707.206.4122, for defendant Ulf Kauffeldt, an individual, DBA Timberline Construction Company.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT ULF INGMNAR KAUFFELDT, AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA TIMBERLINE CONSTRUCTION COMPANY, INC.'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is granted. The evidence demonstrates that defendant was not served with the Labor Commissioner's documents, including the award. The motion is timely under CCP 473.5 because it was brought within 2 years of the entry of the judgment. Order signed in open Court. Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.
